chapter_title.ar: باب وَقْتِ الصَّلَاةِ فِي السَّفَرِ وَ الْجَمْعِ بَيْنَ الصَّلَاتَيْنِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 76 – Timing of the Salāt during the journey and the gathering between the two Salāt

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/373)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/373)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَقْتُ الْمَغْرِبِ فِي السَّفَرِ إِلَى ثُلُثِ اللَّيْلِ وَ رُوِيَ أَيْضاً إِلَى نِصْفِ اللَّيْلِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Abdullah Bin Aamir, from Ali Bin Mahziyar, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Aban, from Umar Bin Yazeed who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘The timing for Al-Maghrib during the journey it up to a third of the night’. And it is reported as well, ‘Up to half the night’.
en.sarwar: 5. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn ‘Amir from Ali ibn Mahziyar from Fadalah ibn Ayyub from Aban from ‘Umar ibn Yazid who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The time for al-Maghrib on a journey is up to one-third of the night.’ It is also narrated that it is up to midnight.”
